translated: ProSeka Talk.
Grow Glorious Grow edition.
Good evening, everyone.
I'm Rina Honnizumi, the voice of Momojan's Shizuku Hinomori.
Yes.
This ProSeka AfterTalk is a place where we look back on the event story and enjoy the AfterLive together with everyone watching the stream.
This time, we're covering the Grow Glorious Grow event.
The event just ended a moment ago, but did you all check it out?
How was it?
I'll be keeping an eye on the comments, so please send them in.
Actually, I jotted down some notes earlier about things I wanted to talk about,
so I'm looking forward to discussing those with all of you.
That's the plan, anyway.
I was just so surprised.
Both as Momojan and as Shizuku, she's overcome so many walls, and she'd already grown wings and taken flight, but...
She's still surpassing herself.
Her growth just doesn't stop.
She's truly cool.
So, please post your thoughts on the event and this broadcast using the hashtag #ProSekaAfterTalk.
I have the YouTube chat right here in front of me,
so I'll be picking up any comments that catch my eye.
Oh, Kon-more!
Thank you.
The staff has provided me with a device again this time,
so I'd like to use it to look at the story and the illustrations of the members appearing in this event.
Also, I'll be creating a private room for the AfterLive so we can watch it together.
I'll share the Room ID around 21:55, and I'll let you know again when the time comes.
